title: stephanopodium estrellense
intro: Stephanopodium estrellense, also known as Estrellense or Step, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is a type of shrub belonging to the family Diapetalaceae, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can contribute to the prevention of various diseases. Stephanopodium estrellense can be prepared in herbal tea, tinctures, or infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
